title: Convert JSON Array of Objects to YAML List of Mappings
cap_description: Convert a JSON array of objects to a YAML sequence of mappings
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a JSON array of objects into a YAML sequence of mappings. Each JSON object becomes one YAML mapping. Use this when downstream caps or configuration files prefer YAML over JSON.

## Inputs

A JSON array of objects.

## Outputs

A YAML sequence of mappings.

## Notes

- Semantically lossless: all JSON key-value types that YAML supports are preserved.
- For the reverse, use [Convert YAML List of Mappings to JSON Array of Objects](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:list;record;textable;yaml";op=convert_format;out="media:json;list;record;textable").

args.arg_description: JSON array of objects to convert
